Engineering numeric features\n\n#  Handling the Rate column & dropping missing data\ndf[\"Rate\"] = pd.to_numeric(df[\"Rate\"], errors=\"coerce\")\n\n# Dropping any rows where the rate became NaN \ndf = df.dropna(subset=[\"Rate\"])\n\n# Scaling the 1-5 rating into a 0 to 1 scale\ndf[\"rate_norm\"] = (df[\"Rate\"] - 1) / 4.0\n\n# Creating a sentiment \"cheat sheet\" based on the stars: 1-2 is negative, 3 is neutral, 4-5 is positive\ndf[\"rate_sentiment\"] = df[\"Rate\"].map({1: -1, 2: -0.5, 3: 0, 4: 0.5, 5: 1})\n\n\n# 2. Extracting text lengths to see if \"longer reviews = angrier reviews\"\ndf[\"review_len\"]    = df[\"Review\"].fillna(\"\").apply(len)\ndf[\"summary_len\"]   = df[\"Summary\"].fillna(\"\").apply(len)\ndf[\"review_words\"]  = df[\"Review\"].fillna(\"\").apply(lambda x: len(x.split()))\ndf[\"summary_words\"] = df[\"Summary\"].fillna(\"\").apply(lambda x: len(x.split()))\n\n\n# 3. Taming extreme price differences\n# Prices vary wildly (e.g., a 10 fan vs a 2000 AC). \n# Using log normalisation so luxury items don't break the model.\ndf[\"log_price\"] = np.log1p(df[\"product_price\"])\n\n\n# 4. Verifing\nprint(\"Numeric features\")\nfor col in [\"rate_norm\", \"rate_sentiment\", \"review_len\", \"summary_len\", \n            \"review_words\", \"summary_words\", \"log_price\"]:\n    print(f\" preprocess_text(text: str) -> str:\n    if not isinstance(text, str) or not text.strip():\n        return \"\"\n \n    # Lowercase\n    text = text.lower()\n \n    # Replacing common contractions before removing punctuation\n    contractions = {\n        \"won't\": \"will not\", \"can't\": \"cannot\", \"n't\": \" not\",\n        \"i'm\": \"i am\", \"you're\": \"you are\", \"it's\": \"it is\",\n        \"that's\": \"that is\", \"didn't\": \"did not\", \"doesn't\": \"does not\",\n        \"isn't\": \"is not\", \"wasn't\": \"was not\", \"don't\": \"do not\",\n    }\n    for contraction, expanded in contractions.items():\n        text = text.replace(contraction, expanded)\n \n    # Remoing everything except letters and spaces\n    text = re.sub(r\"[^a-z\\s]\", \" \", text)\n \n    # Tokenizing\n    tokens = word_tokenize(text)\n \n    # Removing stopwords and short tokens, then lemmatizing\n    tokens = [lemmatizer.lemmatize(token)\n        for token in tokens\n        if token not in STOP_WORDS and len(token) > 2]\n \n    return \" \".join(tokens)","metadata":{"trusted":true,"execution":{"iopub.status.busy":"2026-05-09T08:00:14.875993Z","iopub.execute_input":"2026-05-09T08:00:14.876287Z","iopub.status.idle":"2026-05-09T08:00:14.896727Z","shell.execute_reply.started":"2026-05-09T08:00:14.876227Z","shell.execute_reply":"2026-05-09T08:00:14.895527Z"}},"outputs":[],"execution_count":77},{"cell_type":"code","source":"#
